title: OASIS 3.0.19
release_notes:
FIXES

· Legacy Converter collision grouping now excludes provenance-only fields from schema fingerprints, preventing source row/sheet metadata from changing deduplication behavior.

· Legacy Converter schema usage reporting now uses deterministic ordering for schema names and collision groups.

· SWIFT default service URLs were aligned to the ebaclapi/ebaclapi-pilot endpoints and DCT defaults were added.

· Preferences reset handling now supports resetting the current section only, while preserving unrelated saved preferences.
